mapper.sql: a.id, a.offering_id, a.student_id, a.attendance_date, a.attendance_status, a.remark, a.deleted, a.create_time, a.update_time, sp.student_no, sp.chinese_name, sp.english_name, c.course_code, c.course_name, o.academic_year, o.semester, o.teacher_name

FROM teaching_attendance a INNER JOIN teaching_course_offering o ON o.id=a.offering_id AND o.deleted=0 INNER JOIN teaching_course c ON c.id=o.course_id AND c.deleted=0 INNER JOIN student_profile sp ON sp.id=a.student_id AND sp.deleted=0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO teaching_attendance (offering_id, student_id, attendance_date, attendance_status, remark, deleted) VALUES (#{offeringId}, #{studentId}, #{attendanceDate}, #{attendanceStatus}, #{remark}, 0) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE attendance_status=VALUES(attendance_status), remark=VALUES(remark), deleted=0, update_time=NOW()
mapper.select:
SELECT
ORDER BY a.attendance_date DESC, a.id DESC LIMIT #{query.offset}, #{query.limit}
SELECT WHERE a.student_id=#{studentId} AND a.deleted=0 ORDER BY a.attendance_date DESC, a.id DESC
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM teaching_attendance WHERE student_id=#{studentId} AND attendance_status='ABSENT' AND deleted=0
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM teaching_attendance WHERE student_id=#{studentId} AND offering_id=#{offeringId} AND attendance_status='ABSENT' AND deleted=0
SELECT WHERE a.offering_id=#{offeringId} AND a.student_id=#{studentId} AND a.attendance_date=#{attendanceDate} AND a.deleted=0 LIMIT 1
